articles.title: 'You can't catch your breath' - how will Azteca altitude impact England?
articles.summary: BBC Sport explores how playing football at high altitude affects the body and mind as England prepare to visit Mexico and their fortress Azteca Stadium.

articles.title: Balogun gives USA deserved lead over Bosnia
articles.summary: Folarin Balogun gives the USA the lead against Bosnia-Herzegovina in their round of 32 match at the San Francisco Bay Area Stadium.

articles.title: All the angles of Kane's brilliant winner

articles.title: Tielemans & Trossard go from heated row to rescuing Belgium
articles.summary: Belgium's Leandro Trossard and Youri Tielemans go from arguing with each other during the hydration break to combining to get a crucial equalising goal against Senegal in Seattle.

articles.title: Tielemans scores late extra-time penalty to send Belgium into last 16
articles.summary: Belgium score two late goals to force extra time against Senegal where Youri Tielemans scores a late penalty following a VAR review as Belgium win 3-2 to reach the last 16.

articles.title: Tielemans scores late extra-time penalty in dramatic end to match
articles.summary: Youri Tielemans scores a dramatic late penalty in extra time to see Belgium advance to the last 16 after a 3-2 victory over Senegal in Seattle.

articles.title: Energy and team spirit at highest level - Tuchel
articles.summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel praises his sides team spirit as they come from behind to beat DR Congo 2-1 and advance to the round of 16.

articles.title: Relief for England as Kane heads in equalising goal against DR Congo
articles.summary: Harry Kane heads in from Anthony Gordon's cross as England equalise against DR Congo in their round of 32 game in Atlanta.

articles.title: Chelsea sign Italy defender Palestra for £47m
articles.summary: Right-back Marco Palestra, 21, becomes Xabi Alonso's first signing as Chelsea manager.

articles.title: The small Basque club that produced Arteta, Alonso and Iraola

articles.title: Hull avoid points deduction by selling  players
articles.summary: Hull City avoided the threat of a points deduction in the Premier League by selling two players hours before Tuesday's deadline.

articles.title: Harry Kane: England's greatest and Ballon d'Or contender
articles.summary: Yes, England have issues. They put you through the mill, they're struggling for a right-back. But one problem they don't have is having a world-class matchwinner in their team.

articles.title: Goalscorer Balogun sent off for USA

articles.title: Lopes will relish Messi duel, says Cape Verde defender's mother
articles.summary: The prospect of facing World Cup record goalscorer Lionel Messi in a knockout game would strike fear into most defenders, but not Roberto Lopes, according to the Cape Verde defender's mother.

articles.title: Merse: Mexico is heads-or-tails match - they could run England off their feet
articles.summary: Sky Sports' Paul Merson looks ahead to England's last-16 World Cup encounter with co-hosts Mexico on Monday, a game he thinks is too close to call.

articles.title: 'He is ridiculous' - Rice praise for match-winner Kane

articles.title: 'A huge advantage for Mexico' - England face an Azteca altitude problem
